note: Offline behavioral eval. Run: uv run evals/grade.py (exits non-zero on any failure). Fixtures are small real slices of the AzAdvertizer CSVs plus one synthetic formula-injection row; meta.json carries a fixed ancient fetch date so the staleness assertion is deterministic.

evals.name: staleness-loud
evals.asserts: --max-age-days flags an old snapshot as stale with a warning

evals.name: get-by-id-and-name
evals.asserts: exact lookup works by policyId and by policyName

evals.name: search-substring
evals.asserts: case-insensitive --where filters; all returned rows match

evals.name: role-split
evals.asserts: role list columns split on comma; literal 'empty' -> []

evals.name: initiative-grouped
evals.asserts: denormalized fact table grouped to initiative meta + member policies

evals.name: output-sanitization
evals.asserts: formula-injection cells (= + - @) prefixed with ' on output

evals.name: ingest-failsafe
evals.asserts: schema drift and row-floor refuse and keep existing cache; happy path writes atomically with sha

evals.name: auto-refresh-stale
evals.asserts: a snapshot older than --max-age-days (default 7) auto-refreshes on read when not --offline

evals.name: no-refresh-fresh
evals.asserts: within the freshness window no network is touched; --offline serves stale without refreshing
